creator: richterphilipp.pops@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 190341
SVN diff with svg only for gui

Hello,

I was wondering if qbittorrent-4.0.3 could be merged into the ports. I made a SVN diff using Henry Hu's changes (thank you) but with the svg qt5 dependency moved into the "WITH_GUI" section since it is not needed for qbittorrent-nox11.
